name: skeleton-plugin
description: Starter template for building plugins that support both Codex and Claude Code platforms.

interface.shortDescription: Starter template for Codex and Claude Code plugins
interface.longDescription: A dual-platform starter plugin with manifests, commands, hooks, MCP, and asset placeholders for building new plugins.
defaultPrompt: Set up this skeleton plugin for a new workflow and list the files I should customize first.
Turn this starter plugin into a minimal local automation for my repo.
Review this skeleton and suggest which placeholder commands, skills, and hooks I should keep or remove.
